name: @starhikari/koishi-plugin-credit
description: 用于指令调用的点数系统

description.zh: 基于指令调用的点数系统，通过签到获得点数，用于其他插件的调用。支持图片显示排行榜
description.en: A point system for command invocation, where points are earned through check-ins and can be used for other plugin calls.Supports displaying leaderboards with images.
